TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: squliq na ptqsinuw Tayal hya' ga ptqsinuw na squliq kruma' ka maha Tayal hya' ga yaqu tmqsinuw qu sqyanux naha' qani hya' ga, yalaw gi pncisal krayryax qu mmlikuy na Tayal ga, mutu giway zyuwaw na tmqsinuw nanak qu spkayal naha', ru yaqu zyuwaw 'nwahan naha' tmqsinuw qnanak qu spnqzyu' naha', qu zyuwaw yan nqani hya' ga mzyay' nqu laylaqi' mqwas biru' ka, ana ya'qu musa' mqwas biru' ru mqbaq miru' balay qu spzyang naha' s'usa' Gaku' ga, mwah ngasal lga giway nanak yaqu ima' qu spzyang balay haylaw mayqzinah, ima' qu spzayng balay baq mqwas, ru ima' qu lawkah balay mkzyap nanak spnqzyu' naha'. ungat ana qutux qu mwah pnqzyu' na maha maha nanu' kin blaq balay mqbaq biru'. nanu' ka mmlikuy na Tayal uzi ga, aw' yaqu mqumah qu spzyang naha' sqyanux ga, ungat ana qutux qu knayal na kinblaq psyaqan na mqumah hya', min'uqu' yaqu musa' tmqsinuw squ pinkzyapan naha' sa squliq qu spnqzyu' naha', nanu' misa yan nasa gi musa' tmqsinuw squ zyuwaw na mkzyap hya ga yasa qu mutuw skrahu' rqyas na mmlikuy ru.
S.PHON: s~…ēquliq na ptqs~…ēinuw tajal ńßja Ē …£a ptqs~…ēinuw na s~…ēquliq kruma Ē ka mańßa tajal ńßja Ē …£a jaqu tmqs~…ēinuw qu s~…ēqjanux nańßa Ē qani ńßja Ē …£a, jalaw …£i pn ¶~ ®is~…ēal krajrjax qu mmlikuj na tajal …£a, mutu …£iwaj zjuwaw na tmqs~…ēinuw nanak qu s~…ēpkajal nańßa Ē, ru jaqu zjuwaw Ēnwańßan nańßa Ē tmqs~…ēinuw qnanak qu s~…ēpnqzju Ē nańßa Ē, qu zjuwaw jan nqani ńßja Ē …£a mzjaj Ē nqu lajlaqi Ē mqwas~…ē ő≤iru Ē ka, ana ja Ēqu mus~…ēa Ē mqwas~…ē ő≤iru Ē ru mqő≤aq miru Ē ő≤alaj qu s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē s~…ē Ēus~…ēa Ē …£aku Ē …£a, mwańß Ňčas~…ēal l…£a …£iwaj nanak jaqu ima Ē qu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤alaj ńßajlaw majqzinańß, ima Ē qu s~…ēpzajŇč ő≤alaj ő≤aq mqwas~…ē, ru ima Ē qu lawkańß ő≤alaj mkzjap nanak s~…ēpnqzju Ē nańßa Ē. uŇčat ana qutux qu mwańß pnqzju Ē na mańßa mańßa nanu Ē kin ő≤laq ő≤alaj mqő≤aq ő≤iru Ē. nanu Ē ka mmlikuj na tajal uzi …£a, aw Ē jaqu mqumańß qu s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē s~…ēqjanux …£a, uŇčat ana qutux qu knajal na kinő≤laq ps~…ējaqan na mqumańß ńßja Ē, min Ēuqu Ē jaqu mus~…ēa Ē tmqs~…ēinuw s~…ēqu pinkzjapan nańßa Ē s~…ēa s~…ēquliq qu s~…ēpnqzju Ē nańßa Ē, nanu Ē mis~…ēa jan nas~…ēa …£i mus~…ēa Ē tmqs~…ēinuw s~…ēqu zjuwaw na mkzjap ńßja …£a jas~…ēa qu mutuw s~…ēkrańßu Ē rqjas~…ē na mmlikuj ru.
S.FORM: squliq na ptqsinuw Tayal hya' ga ptqsinuw na squliq kruma' ka maha Tayal hya' ga yaqu tmqsinuw qu sqyanux naha' qani hya' ga, yalaw gi pncisal krayryax qu mmlikuy na Tayal ga, mutu giway zyuwaw na tmqsinuw nanak qu spkayal naha', ru yaqu zyuwaw 'nwahan naha' tmqsinuw qnanak qu spnqzyu' naha', qu zyuwaw yan nqani hya' ga mzyay' nqu laylaqi' mqwas biru' ka, ana ya'qu musa' mqwas biru' ru mqbaq miru' balay qu spzyang naha' s'usa' Gaku' ga, mwah ngasal lga giway nanak yaqu ima' qu spzyang balay haylaw mayqzinah, ima' qu spzayng balay baq mqwas, ru ima' qu lawkah balay mkzyap nanak spnqzyu' naha'. ungat ana qutux qu mwah pnqzyu' na maha maha nanu' kin blaq balay mqbaq biru'. nanu' ka mmlikuy na Tayal uzi ga, aw' yaqu mqumah qu spzyang naha' sqyanux ga, ungat ana qutux qu knayal na kinblaq psyaqan na mqumah hya', min'uqu' yaqu musa' tmqsinuw squ pinkzyapan naha' sa squliq qu spnqzyu' naha', nanu' misa yan nasa gi musa' tmqsinuw squ zyuwaw na mkzyap hya ga yasa qu mutuw skrahu' rqyas na mmlikuy ru.
S.PHON: s~…ēquliq na ptqs~…ēinuw tajal ńßja Ē …£a ptqs~…ēinuw na s~…ēquliq kruma Ē ka mańßa tajal ńßja Ē …£a jaqu tmqs~…ēinuw qu s~…ēqjanux nańßa Ē qani ńßja Ē …£a, jalaw …£i pn ¶~ ®is~…ēal krajrjax qu mmlikuj na tajal …£a, mutu …£iwaj zjuwaw na tmqs~…ēinuw nanak qu s~…ēpkajal nańßa Ē, ru jaqu zjuwaw Ēnwańßan nańßa Ē tmqs~…ēinuw qnanak qu s~…ēpnqzju Ē nańßa Ē, qu zjuwaw jan nqani ńßja Ē …£a mzjaj Ē nqu lajlaqi Ē mqwas~…ē ő≤iru Ē ka, ana ja Ēqu mus~…ēa Ē mqwas~…ē ő≤iru Ē ru mqő≤aq miru Ē ő≤alaj qu s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē s~…ē Ēus~…ēa Ē …£aku Ē …£a, mwańß Ňčas~…ēal l…£a …£iwaj nanak jaqu ima Ē qu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤alaj ńßajlaw majqzinańß, ima Ē qu s~…ēpzajŇč ő≤alaj ő≤aq mqwas~…ē, ru ima Ē qu lawkańß ő≤alaj mkzjap nanak s~…ēpnqzju Ē nańßa Ē. uŇčat ana qutux qu mwańß pnqzju Ē na mańßa mańßa nanu Ē kin ő≤laq ő≤alaj mqő≤aq ő≤iru Ē. nanu Ē ka mmlikuj na tajal uzi …£a, aw Ē jaqu mqumańß qu s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē s~…ēqjanux …£a, uŇčat ana qutux qu knajal na kinő≤laq ps~…ējaqan na mqumańß ńßja Ē, min Ēuqu Ē jaqu mus~…ēa Ē tmqs~…ēinuw s~…ēqu pinkzjapan nańßa Ē s~…ēa s~…ēquliq qu s~…ēpnqzju Ē nańßa Ē, nanu Ē mis~…ēa jan nas~…ēa …£i mus~…ēa Ē tmqs~…ēinuw s~…ēqu zjuwaw na mkzjap ńßja …£a jas~…ēa qu mutuw s~…ēkrańßu Ē rqjas~…ē na mmlikuj ru.
